archetype: Swiss & High-Contrast mixed with Organic & Earthy

scale.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none text-ink font-bold
scale.h2: text-3xl sm:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-tight text-ink font-semibold

layout.spacing: Generous. p-8, p-12, py-24. Tailwind scale.
layout.grid: Bento grids for features. Split layout for hero. Mobile-first.
layout.borderRadius: rounded-2xl for cards, rounded-full for buttons.

components.buttons: Primary: bg-cc-navy text-white hover:bg-ink. Accent: bg-cc-lime text-cc-navy hover:bg-cc-lime-2. Both should be rounded-full with px-6 py-3 for substantial feel.
components.navigation: Sticky top-0 z-50 glassmorphism bg-soft-bg/80 backdrop-blur-xl border-b border-cc-mid-blue/10.
components.cards: White background, subtle shadow-sm, 1px border-cc-mid-blue/10, hover:-translate-y-1 transition-all duration-300.

motion.scroll: Framer motion scroll reveal (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1) on section load.
motion.compass: Unexpected Design Move: A glowing compass element rendered behind the hero dashboard. Needs to have a slowly rotating halo and an animated needle pointing to 'Recruitment Success'. Can use the generated compass_dial image with CSS rotation, layered with glowing divs (bg-cc-cyan blur-3xl).
motion.chart: Horizontal bar charts in the Market Data section animating width from 0 to their target percentage on inView.
motion.steps: Vertical or horizontal line with a progress fill animation highlighting the 4 steps on scroll.
motion.dashboard_float: Subtle floating animation (y: -5 to 5) for the glassy product card in the hero section.

hero_background.description: Subtle Riad interior. Use as hero background with a heavy soft-bg overlay (e.g. bg-soft-bg/90) to provide subtle warmth and texture without reducing text contrast.

compass_dial.description: 3D generated compass dial for the unexpected design move behind the hero dashboard.

sections_instructions.navigation: Sticky top bar. Links: Votre réalité, Données, Méthode, Démo, Fonctionnalités. CTA: Publier mon besoin.
sections_instructions.hero: Split layout. Left: Badge, Headline, Subtitle, CTA (external link), Stats (462+ entreprises / 4949+ offres / 100% gratuit). Right: Glassmorphism dashboard preview overlapping the animated compass needle motif. Include the compass dial image rotating behind the glassy UI.
sections_instructions.problem: Heading: 'Vous gérez déjà assez de choses.' Grid of 4 cards showing empathy for Riad owners' struggles.
sections_instructions.trust: Official proof section. Bold metrics with minimal supporting text.
sections_instructions.data_chart: Official Market Data section. 8 horizontal bars representing sectors. Use cc-cyan for 7 bars, cc-lime for the top sector. Animate width on scroll.
sections_instructions.how_it_works: 4 connected step cards (Publiez/Recevez/Évaluez/Embauchez) with an animated scroll line connecting them.
sections_instructions.riad_benefits: 6 cards (Réception, Ménage, Cuisine, Service, Haute saison, Qualité avis) styled in a bento grid.
sections_instructions.dashboard_demo: Label: 'Simulation de démo — exemple Riad'. A realistic browser frame component showing a mock Kanban board (Nouveau, Présélection, Entretien, Retenu) with candidate cards using provided images.
sections_instructions.cta_final: High impact section. Background ink or cc-navy. CTA button in cc-lime. Includes a lead capture form or link to external signup.

testing: All interactive and key informational elements MUST include a `data-testid` attribute in kebab-case.
